title: Honkai Impact 3rd
description:
Game Introduction of Honkai Impact 3rd

Honkai Impact 3rd is a sci-fi adventure action game developed by HoYoverse.
3D cel-shaded graphics, dynamic combat with free-jumping mechanics, infinite combo, ultra-tight controls... Experience next-gen real-time action!
An original tale told across media, immersive stage events, star-studded voice cast... Become part of the legend!
While the crisis on Earth has momentarily abated, a new journey unfolds on Mars.
Meet Valkyries with unique personalities and delve into the mysteries of Martian civilization together.

Hyperion command system ready. Processing login request... Verified.
Attention, all units! Safety catches unlocked! Download engine transferring high concentrations of energy. Login countdown: 10, 9, 8...

"Captain on the bridge."

From today onwards, you are our Captain!
Please team up with us to fight for all that is beautiful in the world!

V8.8 Adrift in the Sea of Data

v8.8 "Adrift in the Sea of Data" is now available. Log in and complete specific event missions to claim a Deepspace Anchor: First Light Character Card.

New AstralOp丨 New S-rank AstralOp Bailu Youyun debuts. Claim up to Equipment Supply Card x12 in the first 60 drops!
Bonuses Event丨 Bonuses Event begins. Complete specific missions to claim a Character Card!
New Story丨 Main Story Part 2 Chapter Ⅻ: With You, Whom I Never Knew begins. Play to get rewards!
New Event丨 Featured event "Project Sea of Data: Thesis Crisis" begins. Complete event missions to get a new outfit and more!
New Outfit丨 Silverwing: N-EX's outfit "Maximum Velocity" debuts!

"Want to know how to give yourself a palm-sized hug? Hold out your hand, and I'll teach you!"

S-rank AstralOp丨Bailu Youyun

New S-rank AstralOp Bailu Youyun debuts. For the first 60 AstralOp Supply drops, every 10 drops give Equipment Supply Card x2 (up to Equipment Supply Card x12).
Recommended for World Star Astral Ring teams, she can buff the team during Stellar Surplus. Her Synergy Attack draws in nearby enemies and deals Lightning DMG.

As the doomsday countdown ticked away, the girl dried her tears, wiping away the unease in her heart along with them.
And so, the people saw a tiny figure running about and calling out; they heard her answer loudly after mustering her courage:
The sparkle of light is never confined to a mere instant.
In that moment, her small figure seemed like a towering lighthouse. Guided by her light, the future forged forward.

New Story丨With You, Whom I Never Knew

Main Story Part 2 Chapter Ⅻ: With You, Whom I Never Knew begins. At a dusk yet to turn to night, to whom has time bid farewell? Play the main story to get Crystals, Source Prisms, and other rewards.

New Event丨Project Sea of Data: Thesis Crisis, First Light Before Dawn

Featured event "Project Sea of Data: Thesis Crisis" begins. Right before the research makes major progress, a crucial instrument unexpectedly goes "Boom!"... An operation to save a thesis and Oxia begins! Complete event missions to get Silverwing: N-EX's new outfit "Maximum Velocity", Crystals, an event emblem, and more.
Bonuses Event "First Light Before Dawn" begins. Complete specific missions to claim a Deepspace Anchor: First Light Character Card.
Event "Starry Voyage: Strike Back!" returns!

New Weapons丨Blue Thunder Shuttle EX19, Blue Thunder Shuttle: Protocol One

Silverwing: N-EX's new Divine Key "Blue Thunder Shuttle EX19" and PRI-ARM "Blue Thunder Shuttle: Protocol One" released! When Silverwing: N-EX is equipped with them, she can activate Astral Ring Specialization: World Star.
